mapper.update: /* 불필요 수집대상 처리 : waternetTagMapper.updateNoneCollectableTag */ update wnet_tag a set use_yn = 'N' where 1=1 and not exists ( select 1 from msrm_ds_d z where 1=1 and a.tag_sn = z.tag_sn )
/* 필요 수집대상 처리 : waternetTagMapper.updateCollectableTag */ update wnet_tag a set use_yn = 'Y' where 1=1 and exists ( select 1 from msrm_ds_d z where 1=1 and a.tag_sn = z.tag_sn )
